port_pattern.summary: t0008 established the canonical DSGC port pattern: download ModelDB zip, unpack into assets/library/<slug>/, compile MOD files with nrnivmodl, run canonical 12-angle x 20-trial drifting-bar sweep via t0012 tuning_curve_loss scoring library, record envelope outcome in an answer asset.
known_pitfalls: Poleg-Polsky 2016 implements DS via per-angle gabaMOD parameter swap, not spatial rotation; spatial-rotation proxy underscores direction tuning (see S-0008-02).
Morphology swap preserved section-count and surface-area parity but did not rescue envelope compliance (DSI 0.316, peak 18.1 Hz both FAIL).

dependencies.phase_b_gap: t0008 Phase B ran as a desk survey (not a full three-pass search) and identified Hanson 2019 as the highest-priority sibling port candidate. No new library assets were produced in Phase B. This is the gap t0010 was created to close.

conclusion: Sole dependency t0008_port_modeldb_189347 is completed and its port pattern + envelope targets are fully documented. t0010 can proceed to implementation using the same code/ scaffolding and scoring library.
